heading: Report on previous transfers
label: 2203 Report on previous transfers
text: Not later than 90 days after , the President shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report describing any spoils of war obtained subsequent to that were transferred to any party, including any government, group, or person, before . Such report shall be submitted in unclassified form to the extent possible.April 30, 1994August 2, 1990April 30, 1994
